allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('success:', j.success\); j.data.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id.padEnd\(10\), x.price, x.change\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('success:', j.success\); j.data.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.stockId, x.name, x.market\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('success:', j.success\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j.data, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(mkdir -p api types models viewmodels views/layout views/pages components/Modal components/LoadingPanel components/Toast components/ConfirmDialog components/StatusBadge components/SummaryCard components/FormInputs components/Charts)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\)")
